required_evidence: Compliance Officer claim review for landing copy and disclaimers
Professional review note if regulated wording remains before public use
acceptance_criteria: Every public claim is traceable to MARKETING-MATERIALS-V1 or a later local source packet.
No performance guarantee, individualized advice, or KIS commercial clearance claim remains.
Owner/R3 approval remains required before public use.
stale_evidence_triggers: Landing copy or claim wording changes
Compliance policy, disclaimer, or channel policy changes
Source preview hash changes
checklist_items.rollback_or_archive_instruction: Archive or refresh the checklist item if source copy, compliance posture, or Owner/R3 boundary changes.

required_evidence: QA generated-file review plan for layout, links, metadata, and stale claims
Doc Steward source trace from draft material to export source
Compliance review for claims, disclaimers, and regulated wording
acceptance_criteria: PDF source content is traceable to local reviewed source artifacts.
Export remains blocked until Owner/R3 approves final asset generation.
No binary PDF path or public distribution target is recorded.
stale_evidence_triggers: PDF source content, design, or disclaimer changes
Rendering contract or preview manifest hash changes
Compliance claim review status changes
checklist_items.rollback_or_archive_instruction: Keep the checklist item as source-only or archive it if final export scope is withdrawn.

required_evidence: QA generated-file review plan for slide order, overflow, notes, and metadata
Doc Steward source trace from deck source to reviewed packet
Compliance review for claims, disclaimers, and regulated wording
acceptance_criteria: Deck source content is traceable to local reviewed source artifacts.
Export remains blocked until Owner/R3 approves final asset generation.
No binary PPTX path or external presentation target is recorded.
stale_evidence_triggers: PPTX source content, slide design, or disclaimer changes
Rendering contract or preview manifest hash changes
Compliance claim review status changes
checklist_items.rollback_or_archive_instruction: Keep the checklist item as source-only or archive it if final export scope is withdrawn.

required_evidence: Channel policy review for the selected SNS channel
Compliance review for public claims and disclaimers
Owner account setup record handled outside this repository before any live channel action
acceptance_criteria: Channel-specific posting constraints are documented locally.
No OAuth, token, external account, upload, or API action is stored or executed.
Owner/R3 approval remains required before live SNS upload.
stale_evidence_triggers: Target channel changes
Channel policy or platform terms change
Post copy, image, or disclaimer changes
checklist_items.rollback_or_archive_instruction: Withdraw or refresh the checklist item if channel selection, copy, or platform constraints change.

required_evidence: Privacy and customer-record policy for any future contact workflow
Support and refund policy before outreach tied to paid access
Compliance sales-claim review for outreach copy
acceptance_criteria: Customer contact remains future Owner/R3 work, not a current action.
No customer private data, message target, or outbound instruction is stored.
Support, refund, privacy, and claim boundaries are named before contact.
stale_evidence_triggers: Customer segment or offer changes
Privacy, support, refund, or sales-claim policy changes
Outreach copy changes
checklist_items.rollback_or_archive_instruction: Archive the checklist item if customer-contact scope is deferred or replaced by a different sales lane.

required_evidence: Payment, receipt, and refund policy before any payment workflow
Customer-record and retention policy before CRM activation
Business/admin posture confirming whether the paid offer is in scope
acceptance_criteria: CRM/payment setup remains a future gated decision, not a live integration.
No payment request, customer record, bank detail, or provider credential is stored.
Business/admin and compliance posture are named before implementation.
stale_evidence_triggers: Pricing, refund, payment provider, or billing model changes
CRM/customer-record policy changes
Business/admin registration posture changes
checklist_items.rollback_or_archive_instruction: Archive or split into a Sales/Revenue taskset only after Owner/R3 selects a paid workflow.

required_evidence: Approved public claims packet before ad copy is used
Platform policy review for paid placement constraints
Budget approval boundary handled by Owner/R3 before spend
acceptance_criteria: Paid ad copy remains source-only and cannot be run from this checklist.
No platform account, campaign, pixel, budget, or upload target is recorded.
Owner/R3 approval remains required before any spend or live placement.
stale_evidence_triggers: Ad copy, target audience, budget, or offer changes
Platform policy or paid placement rules change
Compliance status of public claims changes
checklist_items.rollback_or_archive_instruction: Withdraw the checklist item if paid placement is deferred or platform scope changes.

required_evidence: Owner-selected external channel and purpose before account action
Credential handling plan that keeps secrets outside this repository
Platform policy review for account, OAuth, and API constraints
acceptance_criteria: External account action remains Owner/R3 work outside local automation.
No OAuth flow, provider API call, token, secret, or browser login is executed.
Selected channel and credential boundary are documented before implementation.
stale_evidence_triggers: External channel, account owner, or provider changes
Credential storage policy changes
Provider API or OAuth policy changes
checklist_items.rollback_or_archive_instruction: Archive the checklist item if Owner does not select a channel or if provider policy blocks automation.

required_evidence: Compliance Officer review for draft-only wording and risk labels
Professional review boundary if Owner intends public, paid, legal, tax, or securities reliance
acceptance_criteria: Checklist remains a draft control and never becomes final advice.
Professional review boundary is explicit before public or paid reliance.
No legal, tax, securities, or regulatory opinion file is recorded.
stale_evidence_triggers: Legal, tax, securities, business model, or paid-offer posture changes
Public copy or disclaimer changes
Compliance role guidance changes
checklist_items.rollback_or_archive_instruction: Archive or refresh the checklist item if any wording is intended for reliance instead of draft review.

taskset_handoff.next_allowed_no_owner_slice: local Owner decision evidence checklist audit preview only; still no actual approval record, approval evidence collection, public approval, final export, SNS upload, customer contact, CRM/payment, external account action, secrets, or KIS/order/risk/prod/deploy changes
owner_r3_required_for: OAuth flow or platform API call
